vocab.simpleEn: the result of an action or process
vocab.simpleZh: 行动或过程产生的结果。
vocab.exampleEn: The outcome of a study plan depends on how consistently it is followed.
vocab.exampleZh: 学习计划的成果取决于执行是否持续。
vocab.upgradeEn: Use outcome instead of result when discussing work, study, or policy.
vocab.upgradeZh: 讨论工作、学习或政策时，用 outcome 替代 result。

cycle.summaryEn: Do listening and reading like the real test, then check the mistakes right away.
cycle.summaryZh: 像正式考试一样做听力和阅读，然后立刻订正。

frame.useEn: Use to support your point with an example.

meaningEn: This writing word helps Becky build stronger IELTS paragraphs and ideas.
meaningZh: 这个写作词可以帮助 Becky 写出更强的雅思段落和观点。
promptEn: China drill: read the Chinese meaning, shadow the example twice, then make one Becky-style sentence with "outcome" using For instance, ...
promptZh: 中文母语者练法：先看中文意思，跟读例句两遍，再用 "outcome" 和 例如... 写一句 Becky 自己的话。
sourceEn: This harder word is auto-picked for Becky and refreshes every day with a China-friendly output drill.
sourceZh: 这个高分词会每天自动为 Becky 刷新，并配中文母语者适用的输出练习。
